title: Implement peer table for RX signature verification
description:
The RX path in lichen_l2.c passes peer_pubkey=NULL to lichen_link_rx(), which skips Schnorr-48 signature verification. The Python reference implementation (link_layer.py:363-391) requires signature verification and REJECTS frames from unknown senders.

Required work:
1. Design peer table structure (pubkey + EUI-64 per neighbor)
2. Implement peer registration API (called after EDHOC handshake or provisioning)
3. Implement peer lookup in lichen_l2_input() - try known peers' pubkeys
4. REJECT frames when no matching peer found (security-critical)

The replay.h API pattern (lichen_replay_table with LRU eviction) may serve as a template.

See SECURITY comment in lichen_l2.c around line 798.
close_reason: Implemented: peer_table structure, lichen_peer_add/remove API, peer_try_all_pubkeys() wired into RX path. Frames from unknown peers are now REJECTED.
